evals.name: rest-with-coverage-sweep
evals.prompt: Run sdlc-api against the docs/PRD.yaml, docs/UX.yaml, and docs/DATA-MODEL.yaml in this project. For every multiple-choice question, pick the recommended (position-1) option. For free-text questions, give a one-line plausible answer. Skip optional themes during the gate. The PRD declares 4 FR (FR-001..FR-004) + 2 WKF (WKF-001, WKF-002) + DATA has 4 entities (Task, Comment, AuditLog, DigestRun). The UX has 4 SCR surfaces (SCR-001..SCR-004). Key canaries: FR-004 (weekly digest email) is a backend feature anchored on DigestRun with NO UX surface and NO core_workflow, so the inventory should either propose a `digests` cross-cutting resource OR opt FR-004 into non_api_features; AuditLog has no FR trace so the agent should flag it as internal-only via api_warnings rather than creating a public resource for it; SCR-004 (settings) has no FR trace and no entity — surface coverage must either route it to an admin/settings resource or record a WRN deferral. Write API.yaml + per-resource yamls and validate.
evals.expected_output: A docs/API.yaml with api_kind: rest and a resource_inventory covering Task and Comment at minimum. Every endpoint in every docs/API__<resource>.yaml carries a stable `id: OPR-NNN` (validator-enforced). Every traces_prd_features entry uses FR-NNN format; every traces_ux_surfaces entry uses SCR-NNN format (never kebab slugs); any traces_prd_workflows entries use WKF-NNN format. FR-004 is EITHER traced by a resource (e.g. `digests`) OR listed in non_api_features. Every PRD FR-NNN ends up either traced or in non_api_features (feature-coverage passes). Every data-bearing SCR is traced by ≥1 resource (surface-coverage passes). Every primary_entity matches a DATA entity name (entity-link passes). api_warnings (if any) all start with WRN-NNN. metadata.changelog is initialized. validate_schema.py exits 0 with [OK] and status complete.

evals.name: api-kind-none
evals.prompt: Run sdlc-api against the docs/PRD.yaml, docs/UX.yaml, and docs/DATA-MODEL.yaml in this project. The PRD declares runtime_platform: cli and surface_family: cli — a pure local CLI tool with NO network surface. For every choice, pick the recommended (position-1) option; for free-text, give a one-line plausible answer. Verify the agent picks api_kind: none in Phase 4 and skips themes 2-11. Write API.yaml + validate.
evals.expected_output: A docs/API.yaml with api_kind: none, a one-sentence rationale field, empty/null resource_inventory, no docs/API__<resource>.yaml files. metadata.changelog is initialized with at least one entry. api_warnings is empty or every entry starts with WRN-NNN. Coverage + entity-link checks are skipped (api_kind: none). validate_schema.py exits 0 with [OK] (api_kind: none) and status complete.
